title: Room Attendant
description:
Job Summary

You will maintain cleanliness and order in guest rooms and common areas, manage linens and amenities, and ensure guest privacy and security. You will also report maintenance issues and handle lost and found items to support smooth hotel operations.

Responsibilities

  • Check and stock linens and amenities daily to ensure guest rooms are fully equipped
  • Clean guest rooms and common areas to maintain high hygiene and presentation standards
  • Perform rotation cleaning tasks such as thorough cleaning and carpet shampooing to uphold cleanliness quality
  • Maintain cleanliness and security of your work area while respecting guest privacy
  • Identify and report faulty items needing repair to the Duty Manager during cleaning activities
  • Collect and hand over any Lost and Found items to the Duty Manager promptly
  • Accurately count and record soiled linens for proper handling and inventory management
  • Clean and maintain cleaning equipment, including trolleys and vacuum cleaners, after each use
  • Collaborate with team members to complete assigned duties efficiently and support hotel operations

Required competencies and certifications

  • Ability to understand and communicate in simple English to follow instructions and report issues
  • Knowledge of vacuum cleaner operation and safe handling of cleaning chemicals to perform cleaning tasks effectively
  • Functional skills in room cleaning to deliver consistent cleanliness standards
  • Willingness to work shifts including weekends and public holidays to meet hotel operational needs

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • At least 1 year of experience in housekeeping or a related field to perform duties independently
  • Hardworking team player with a pleasant personality to contribute positively to the work environment

Other Information

  • Work schedule: 6 days per week
  • Location: 32 Hamilton Road
  • Interested candidates, please submit your updated resume via APPLY Now. Please indicate your current and expected salary and date of availability.

postedCompany.description:
ARCADIA HOTEL MANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.

The Arcadia Hotel is a stylish modern hotel in the heart of the vibrant Jalan Besar district of Singapore. Located in a former indutrial heritage conservation area, it is a urban retreat with 36 rooms, a rooftop terence with a Jacuzzi, and a cafe. With the hotel conveniently located with amenities close at hand, guest will find the Arcadia Hotel an ideal base for both work and play in Singapore. Inspired by the exciting revitalization of the area. The Arcadia Hotel's rooms provide an abode in the city, offering a peaceful, private and a calm space - creating an ambience of stillness and quiet.
